name: Honey Lemonade
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir honey and hot water over low heat until blended.
2. Let cool, then add lemon juice and cold water.
3. Pour into iced glasses.
4. The honey/water syrup may be refrigerated and used to make lemonade a glass at a time.
5. To serve, mix 4 tablespoons syrup to 1 1/2 tablespoons lemon juice and 1 cup water per person.
